Refine shopping list test with seeded data

The "Connection Test" for the Vikunja API credential in n8n consistently fails with a "Couldn't connect with these settings" or "Not Found" error message. However, despite this error, actual workflow nodes using the same credential (e.g., "GET MANY TASKS") are able to successfully connect to the Vikunja API and retrieve data.

To Reproduce

Vikunja Version: My Vikunja instance is running v0.24.6.
n8n Version: [Insert your exact n8n version here. You can find this in n8n under Settings -> About].
Go to n8n Credential: 1.93.0
n8n community node: 0.3.0
Click on "Add Credential" and select "Vikunja API".
In the credential settings, set the "API URL" to: https://YOUR_VIKUNJA_DOMAIN.com/api/v1.
Enter a valid Vikunja API Key (e.g., tk_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx).
Click "Save" or "Test Connection".
Expected behavior
The "Connection Test" should pass and indicate "Connection tested successfully".

Observed behavior
The "Connection Test" displays an error: "Couldn't connect with these settings" or "Not Found".

Relevant Logs & Screenshots:

1. n8n Credential Error Screenshot:
[Upload a screenshot of the n8n credential showing the "Couldn't connect" error, ensuring no sensitive data like your exact API key is visible.]

2. Vikunja API Logs (showing n8n's connection test failing):
When n8n attempts the connection test, Vikunja logs show a 404 Not Found for /api/v1/token/test, indicating this specific test endpoint does not exist in Vikunja v0.24.6.

[TIMESTAMP]: WEB        ▶ [N8N_SERVER_IP_ADDRESS]  GET 404 /api/v1/token/test [DURATION] - n8n

3. Vikunja API Logs (showing successful curl request with same URL & Key):
A curl command from the n8n host machine to the /api/v1/info endpoint with the same base URL and API Key succeeds, demonstrating that the API is reachable and the key is valid.

[TIMESTAMP]: WEB        ▶ [N8N_SERVER_IP_ADDRESS]  GET 200 /api/v1/info [DURATION] - curl/[CURL_VERSION]
(You can also include the full curl -v output for /api/v1/info from your console, just remember to redact your actual API Key from the output before pasting).

4. Vikunja API Logs (showing successful actual workflow API call):
Actual workflow execution using the same credential successfully retrieves tasks.

[TIMESTAMP]: WEB        ▶ [N8N_SERVER_IP_ADDRESS]  GET 200 /api/v1/projects/[PROJECT_ID]/tasks [DURATION] - n8n
Information I've gathered:

The n8n user agent in Vikunja logs indicates the connection test is initiated by the n8n application itself.
The specific endpoint /api/v1/token/test appears to be used for the connection test in the newer n8n Vikunja node.
This endpoint does not seem to exist in Vikunja v0.24.6.
My curl tests directly from the n8n host machine confirm that https://YOUR_VIKUNJA_DOMAIN.com/api/v1 is the correct base API URL and the API key is valid and can retrieve data from other endpoints like /api/v1/info.
The workflow itself functions correctly when calling specific API endpoints for tasks.
My previous n8n version (which worked) did not have a "Test Connection" button on the Vikunja credential, suggesting this feature was introduced in a later n8n node version and might have an incompatibility with older Vikunja APIs.
